# One Sun America

> Licensed roofing contractor serving Greater Houston, TX and surrounding areas. BBB A+ rated. Bilingual English/Spanish. Specializing in roof replacement, hail and storm damage, insurance claims, and roof maintenance.

One Sun America is a locally-owned roofing contractor based in Houston, Texas, serving residential homeowners across the Greater Houston metro area. The company specializes in insurance-based roofing work (hail and storm damage), full roof replacements, gutters, and maintenance packages. Licensed, insured, and BBB A+ accredited. Spanish-speaking crews available.

Contact: (832) 865-5743 | info@onesunamerica.com | 6300 N Main St, Houston TX 77009

## Services

- [Roof Replacement](https://onesunamerica.com/quote.html): Full tear-off and replacement with architectural shingles, metal, tile, or slate. Permits pulled and managed.
- [Storm & Hail Damage](https://onesunamerica.com/insurance.html): Free inspection, complete insurance claim documentation, adjuster coordination. Most Texas homeowner policies cover hail damage.
- [Roof Maintenance](https://onesunamerica.com/maintenance.html): Tune-up packages starting at $399. Pipe jack replacement, shingle repair, sealant, gutter cleaning. For homeowners who don't need a full replacement.
- [Gutters](https://onesunamerica.com/gutters.html): Seamless aluminum gutters, copper gutters, gutter guards, and downspout replacement.

## Houston Neighborhood Pages

Detailed local roofing information, hail history, and free inspection request for each neighborhood:

- [River Oaks Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/river-oaks-roofing.html): ZIP 77019. Avg home value $1.5M–$5M+. Historic 1920s estate homes. HOA/deed restrictions. Complex rooflines, premium materials.
- [West University Place Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/west-university-roofing.html): ZIP 77005. #3 wealthiest US suburb. Avg household income $409K. Homes 1930s–1970s.
- [Bellaire Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/bellaire-roofing.html): ZIP 77401. Independent city with own building permits. Homes 1950s–1980s. Avg $1.13M+.
- [Memorial Houston Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/memorial-houston-roofing.html): ZIP 77024. Covers all 6 Memorial Villages. Homes $750K–$3M+. Complex permit systems per village.
- [Piney Point Village Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/piney-point-roofing.html): ZIP 77024. Median home $3M+. One of the wealthiest US municipalities. Independent city permits.
- [Hunters Creek Village Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/hunters-creek-roofing.html): ZIP 77024. Avg $1.5M–$5M+. Memorial Villages. Dense tree canopy, independent city permits.
- [Tanglewood Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/tanglewood-roofing.html): ZIP 77056. Homes $1M–$3M. Built 1950s–1970s. Between River Oaks and Galleria.
- [Galleria / Uptown Houston Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/galleria-houston-roofing.html): ZIP 77056–77057. HOA-compliant roofing. Mixed residential $500K–$2M.
- [Meyerland Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/meyerland-roofing.html): ZIP 77096. Post-Harvey rebuild specialists. Flooded 2015, 2016, 2017. Elevated homes on piers.
- [Braeswood Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/braeswood-roofing.html): ZIP 77025. Near Texas Medical Center. Homes 1950s–1970s. $450K–$900K.
- [Houston Heights Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/houston-heights-roofing.html): ZIP 77008. Est. 1891. Victorian, Craftsman, bungalow homes. Historic preservation considerations.
- [Montrose Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/montrose-roofing.html): ZIP 77006. Homes 1920s–1940s. Craftsman, Tudor Revival, Spanish Colonial. $500K–$1.5M.
- [Cinco Ranch Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/cinco-ranch-roofing.html): ZIP 77494, Katy TX. Master-planned community. HOA approval managed. Homes 1990s–2020s.
- [First Colony Roofing](https://onesunamerica.com/first-colony-roofing.html): ZIP 77479, Sugar Land TX. Original Sugar Land master-planned community. HOA (FCA) approval managed.

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- **BBB Rating**: A+ Accredited
- **License**: Texas licensed and insured roofing contractor
- **Languages**: English and Spanish (bilingual crews)
- **Service Radius**: 40 miles from Houston city center
- **Hail Exposure**: Houston metro receives 4–6 significant hail events per year
- **Insurance Work**: ~90% of projects are insurance-based (hail/storm damage)
- **Maintenance Packages**: Starting at $399 (Tune-Up), $799 (Repair & Seal), $1,499 (Full Protection)
- **Phone**: (832) 865-5743
- **Address**: 6300 N Main St, Houston TX 77009
- **Email**: info@onesunamerica.com
- **Website**: https://onesunamerica.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Does homeowner's insurance cover hail damage in Houston?**
Yes. Most standard Texas homeowner's insurance policies cover hail damage. Houston receives 4–6 significant hail events per year. One Sun America provides free inspections and complete documentation to support insurance claims.

**What is the difference between roof repair and roof replacement?**
Roof repair addresses localized damage — missing shingles, leaking pipe jacks, failing sealant — and is appropriate for roofs under 15 years old with limited damage. Full replacement is needed when the roof has widespread damage, is over 20 years old, or has multiple problem areas. One Sun America inspects and gives an honest recommendation.

**Do you serve the Memorial Villages (Piney Point, Hunters Creek, etc.)?**
Yes. One Sun America serves all six Memorial Villages: Piney Point Village, Hunters Creek Village, Hedwig Village, Spring Valley Village, Bunker Hill Village, and Hilshire Village. Each village has its own independent building permits and inspections, which One Sun America manages as part of every project.

**How long does a roof replacement take in Houston?**
Most Houston homes take 1–2 days for a complete roof replacement. Larger estate properties may take 2–4 days. One Sun America schedules efficiently and performs a thorough cleanup before leaving.

**Do you offer financing for roofing projects?**
Yes. Financing options are available for qualified homeowners. Contact us at (832) 865-5743 for details.

**Do you speak Spanish?**
Yes. One Sun America has Spanish-speaking estimators and crews. All forms, contracts, and communications are available in both English and Spanish.
